steps.title: Make two seal-length points
steps.content: At birth, $x=0$ and the seal is 148 cm long, so the starting value is $148$. The seal grows $5.2$ cm per month, so the slope is $5.2$.

steps.title: Read the linear model
steps.content: A linear model is $$y=\text{starting value}+(\text{monthly growth})x.$$ Substituting the values gives $$y=148+5.2x,$$ or $$y=5.2x+148.$$

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: The correct answer is the only equation with starting length $148$ and monthly growth $5.2$. D is correct.
